data.description:

Polar Capital Holdings ( (GB:POLR) ) has shared an announcement.

Polar Capital Holdings has repurchased 20,000 of its 2.5p ordinary shares on 18 February 2026 under its ongoing share buyback programme, at prices between 631p and 637p and a volume-weighted average price of 633.5121p. The shares, bought through Deutsche Numis, will be cancelled, reducing the company’s share count and leaving 101,137,185 ordinary shares in issue, a move that may enhance earnings per share and slightly increase existing shareholders’ voting stakes.

Following this transaction, the total voting rights in Polar Capital now stand at 101,137,185, a key reference figure for investors monitoring disclosure thresholds under FCA transparency rules. The continued execution of the buyback programme underscores management’s commitment to capital returns and suggests confidence in the company’s valuation, with practical implications for liquidity, ownership concentration and regulatory reporting by significant shareholders.

The latest announcement is out from Maven Income and Growth VCT 5 ( (GB:MIG5) ).

Maven Income and Growth VCT 5 PLC has admitted 13,399,375 new ordinary shares of 10p each to trading on the London Stock Exchange’s Main Market, issued under its ongoing offer for subscription. The new shares are fully fungible with the existing stock, taking the total number of ordinary shares in issue to 253,641,645 as of 18 February 2026, which expands the company’s capital base and potentially broadens its investor pool while supporting further investment activity.

The admission follows a prospectus dated 2 October 2025 and covers all share admissions up to and including 18 February 2026 under this offer. By increasing the volume of listed securities and confirming compliance with the Public Offers and Admissions to Trading Regulations 2024, the company reinforces its access to public equity markets and provides existing and new shareholders with enhanced liquidity in its shares.

Tieto has continued its share buyback program, purchasing 50,000 of its own shares on 18 February 2026 on the Helsinki Stock Exchange at an average price of EUR 19.1798, for a total consideration of EUR 958,990. data.title: Pfizer Targets Real-World Myeloma Data in Taiwan With New Elranatamab Study
data.description:
Pfizer Inc (PFE) announced an update on their ongoing clinical study.

President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Pfizer Inc. (PFE) is launching a new real-world study in Taiwan to track how its multiple myeloma drug elranatamab performs outside controlled trials. The study, officially titled “A Multi-center Observational Study of the Effectiveness of Elranatamab in Patients With Relapsed and/or Refractory Multiple Myeloma in Taiwan,” aims to measure everyday outcomes, patient profiles, and treatment patterns in a key Asian market.

The only treatment in focus is elranatamab, a cancer drug already known to target relapsed and refractory multiple myeloma. In this setting, doctors will use it as part of routine care, and the study will observe how patients respond over time in a normal hospital environment.

The trial is observational, meaning there is no random assignment of patients or control arm. Researchers simply follow a cohort of people who receive elranatamab in regular practice, record their outcomes, and look for trends that can guide future treatment decisions.

The study was first submitted on 15 December 2025 and has not yet started recruiting patients, so revenue impact is still future-dated. The latest update was posted on 17 February 2026, showing that the protocol and planning are moving forward even though primary and final completion dates are not yet reported.

For investors, this update supports the longer-term story around Pfizer’s oncology portfolio rather than near-term earnings. Strong real-world data in Taiwan could deepen use across Asia and help Pfizer defend share against rivals in multiple myeloma, including products from Johnson & Johnson and Bristol Myers Squibb.

Market reaction is likely to be muted in the short run, but confirmation of sustained effectiveness and manageable safety in routine care would be a positive catalyst over a multi-year horizon. The new data may also strengthen pricing and reimbursement talks in Asia, which matters as payers become stricter on high-cost oncology drugs.

The study is not yet recruiting but has been recently updated, and more detailed information is available on the ClinicalTrials portal.

To learn more about PFE’s potential, visit the Pfizer Inc drug pipeline page.

data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

An announcement from SmartCraft ASA Class A ( (DE:9YK) ) is now available.

SmartCraft ASA has launched a share buyback offer of up to NOK 75 million, setting an indicative purchase price range of NOK 17.50 to NOK 18.00 per share following investor feedback. The offer is being executed through a reverse bookbuilding process that runs until 20 February, with DNB Carnegie acting as sole bookrunner and the company retaining discretion over allocations to balance its interests with equal treatment of shareholders.

The transaction is structured to comply with Norwegian securities laws and EU market abuse regulations, and is classified as inside information under the relevant rules. By committing significant capital to repurchasing its own shares, SmartCraft is signaling confidence in its valuation and capital position, a move that may support the share price and adjust its capital structure in a way that could benefit remaining shareholders.

More about SmartCraft ASA Class A

SmartCraft ASA is a leading Nordic provider of mission-critical SaaS solutions for small and medium-sized enterprises in the construction sector. The company focuses on boosting productivity, margins and resource efficiency for its more than 14,100 customers across Norway, Sweden, Finland and the UK, and has been listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange since June 2021.

SOL Strategies Inc., a Canadian investment firm specializing in the Solana ecosystem, reported sharply higher staking and validation revenues for its fiscal first quarter ended December 31, 2025. The company continues to build out its role as a key infrastructure and capital provider to Solana-based decentralized applications, reinforcing its niche in the broader blockchain investment landscape.

On February 18, 2026, the company announced that quarterly staking and validation revenue rose 69% year over year to CAD$2.1 million, while staking rewards more than doubled to 9,787 SOL. SOL holdings swelled to about 529,000 tokens, or roughly CAD$92.2 million, up from 139,726 SOL a year earlier, underscoring both balance sheet expansion and increased exposure to Solana as it hosts a webcast and call to discuss its 2025 year-end and Q1 2026 results.

data.title: NP3 Fastigheter Taps Green Bond Market With SEK 400 Million Note Issue
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

NP3 Fastigheter AB ( (SE:NP3) ) just unveiled an update.

NP3 Fastigheter has strengthened its green financing base by issuing SEK 400 million in senior unsecured green notes under its existing MTN programme, with a 4.5-year tenor to August 2030 and pricing set at three-month STIBOR plus 215 basis points. The company plans to list the new instruments on Nasdaq Stockholm’s sustainable bond list and will allocate proceeds in line with its green finance framework, underscoring its commitment to environmentally aligned funding in the Nordic commercial property market.

Nordea Bank and SEB acted as joint bookrunners on the transaction, while Gernandt & Danielsson served as legal counsel, highlighting continued lender and investor appetite for NP3’s green-labelled debt. The additional funding capacity supports NP3’s strategy of investing in higher-yielding commercial assets across northern Sweden, potentially enhancing both portfolio resilience and the firm’s sustainability credentials with stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (SE:NP3) stock is a Sell with a SEK183.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on NP3 Fastigheter AB stock, see the SE:NP3 Stock Forecast page.

More about NP3 Fastigheter AB

NP3 Fastigheter AB is a cash flow–oriented real estate company focused on commercial, high-yielding investment properties, primarily in northern Sweden. Its 2,362,000-square-metre portfolio spans 633 industrial, logistics, retail, office and other properties across eight regional business areas, with a total value of SEK 26.1 billion as of 31 December 2025, and its shares trade on Nasdaq Stockholm’s Large Cap list.

data.title: Philip Morris Highlights Momentum in Smoke-Free Revenue Shift
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Philip Morris ( (PM) ).

On February 18, 2026, Philip Morris International used its appearance at the Consumer Analyst Group of New York Conference to showcase the scale and momentum of its transition toward smoke-free products, highlighting that annual smoke-free net revenues have reached about $17 billion across 106 markets and now account for roughly 42% of total net revenues. Management emphasized that several regions, especially Europe, are already majority smoke-free by net revenues, that overall shipment volumes have shifted from structural decline to low single-digit growth driven by smoke-free products, and that the wider cigarette industry outside China and the U.S. shows steeper declines in markets where smoke-free products are available, underscoring both PMI’s strategic repositioning and the growing regulatory and public-health acceptance of tobacco harm-reduction models centered on non-combustible nicotine options.

The most recent analyst rating on (PM) stock is a Buy with a $210.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Philip Morris stock, see the PM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on PM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PM is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by strong profitability and cash generation, reinforced by upbeat 2026 guidance and continued smoke-free momentum. These positives are tempered by balance-sheet risk (negative equity and high debt), overbought technical signals, and a valuation that looks premium versus the dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on PM stock, click here.

More about Philip Morris

Philip Morris International Inc. is a global tobacco and nicotine company that has been shifting its portfolio from traditional combustible cigarettes toward smoke-free products, including heated tobacco units, oral smoke-free products, e‑vapor and related wellness and consumer accessories. The company focuses on transforming its revenue base by growing smoke-free offerings across more than 100 markets, particularly in Europe, the Americas and emerging regions where regulation allows commercialization of these products.

Average Trading Volume: 5,805,998

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $291.9B
